channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree obstruction road visibility, 14th April
item.description:
Outside number 45 and 47 Sunrise Avenue, Bishops Cleeve, GL52 8EP there are over grown trees blocking road visibility.When pulling out from car park, you cannot see traffic including the buses and it’s becoming dangerous. Someone came 2/3 years ago to cut them back, but very over grown again. Please can someone come cut these back. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole returning towards left of mini roundabout, 14th April
item.description:
Towards left of mini roundabout, outside 141 Leckhampton Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horizontal pothole to the left of road, 14th April
item.description:
Outside junction of Hall Road and Moorend Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Moorend Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in middle of road, 14th April
item.description:
By junction of Warden Hill Road and Warren Close.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: The pictures show two pot separate pot holes fairly close to each other both have gravel coming out of them and are very similar in size, 14th April
item.description:
Located on the road by numbers 12 & 14

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Linden Close, Cheltenham

item.title: Domestic/builders waste, 14th April
item.description:
Recurring tipping old highway off lay-by A38 at Priors Norton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Norton, Tewkesbury

item.title: Several deep potholes have been present for a while, 14th April
item.description:
What three words = angel grapes kite Traffic light junction of college / hewlett / London rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unstable paving slab and trip hazard., 14th April
item.description:
Outside All Bar One Cheltenham - you already appear to have a report about this issue back in 2024. People who unfortunately trip/fall on this paving slab are having to seek 1st aid assistance from All Bar One and on occasion are rude to staff because they think that the issue is there responsibility to repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montpellier Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 14th April
item.description:
Huge pothole across the breadth of the lanes, impossible to avoid, dangerous and slowing down traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 14th April
item.description:
Permanent Repair Damaged Tree Please Cutback to Boundary 4-Way Stop & Go (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unnessessary resurfacing, 14th April
item.description:
Priors. Rd Cheltenham to be resurfaced on 20 April.This road has already been resurfaced and in perfect condition with NO potholes.????
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 260, Priors Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No Entry sign in centre of dual carriageway knocked over. Give Way sign at junction knocked over. Various redundant road signs left by contractor, 14th April
item.description:
What3words: rafters.folks.wink

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shipton, Cotswold

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 14th April
item.description:
NWD / FOOTWAY CLOSURE PLEASE MAKE SAFE X 2 BROKEN OFF TREE BRANCHES HANGING OVER OTHER BRANCHES ROCKING IN THE WIND THEY ARE 5 TO 6 METERS HIGH AND APPROX 3 TO 4 METERS IN LENTH (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
